questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The average of $10, 20, 30, 40$ and $50$ is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Choose the correct comparative form: 'This seam is ____ than the one we mined last year.'
questions.solution:
**Concept.** One-syllable adjectives form the comparative with '-er', and 'than' signals a comparative (not superlative).

**Working.** 'Thick' becomes 'thicker'; 'more thicker' is a double comparative and 'thickest' is superlative.

**Answer.** thicker.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The perimeter of a square of side $9$ is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A can finish a job in $12$ days and B in $6$ days. Working together, they finish it in _____ days.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Add the per-day work rates.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{1}{6}=\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{2}{12}=\dfrac{3}{12}=\dfrac{1}{4}$, so $4$ days.

**Answer.** $4$ days.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: In the right triangle shown, the legs are $3$ and $4$. The length of the hypotenuse is _____ .

figure.caption: Right triangle with legs 3 and 4 and the right angle at the bottom-left.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><polygon points='40,130 160,130 40,40' fill='rgba(99,102,241,0.10)' stroke='#6366f1' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='40' y='118' width='12' height='12' fill='none' stroke='#6366f1' stroke-width='1'/><text x='95' y='145' font-size='12' fill='#334155'>4</text><text x='20' y='90' font-size='12' fill='#334155'>3</text><text x='105' y='80' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444'>?</text></svg>

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A man walks $3$ km north and then $4$ km east. His straight-line distance from the starting point is _____ km.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Perpendicular legs form a right triangle; use Pythagoras.

**Working.** $\sqrt{3^2+4^2}=\sqrt{25}=5$.

**Answer.** $5$ km.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: In the dot series shown ($1, 2, 3, \ldots$ dots), the next figure should contain

figure.caption: Three groups of dots containing one, two and three dots respectively.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='95' cy='30' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='95' cy='50' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='25' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='45' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='65' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><text x='210' y='45' font-size='28' fill='#94a3b8'>?</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** The count increases by one each step.

**Working.** $1, 2, 3, \ldots$ so the next figure has $4$ dots.

**Answer.** 4 dots.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The volume of a cylinder of radius $7$ and height $10$ is _____ (use $\pi=22/7$).

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Pointing to a man, a woman said, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Resolve the description inside-out.

**Working.** 'The only daughter of my mother' is the woman herself, so 'his mother' is the woman — she is his mother.

**Answer.** Mother.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A train $200$ m long moving at $36$ km/h crosses a platform $100$ m long in _____ seconds.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** To cross a platform, the train covers (its length + platform length).

**Working.** Speed $=36\times\tfrac{5}{18}=10$ m/s; distance $=200+100=300$ m; time $=\dfrac{300}{10}=30$ s.

**Answer.** $30$ s.

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $6\,\text{m}$ carries a central point load $40\,\text{kN}$. The magnitude of the fixed-end moment is _____ kN·m.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Fixed-end moment for a central point load $=\dfrac{WL}{8}$.

**Working.**
$$M=\dfrac{40\times 6}{8}=30.$$

**Answer.** $30\,\text{kN·m}$
